136: 	 * @throws StoreError if session not found
137: 	 */
138: 	async update(localId: string, updates: Partial<AgentSession>): Promise<void> {
139: 		const sessions = await this.getAll();
140: 		const index = sessions.findIndex((s) => s.localId === localId);
141: 		if (index === -1) {
142: 			throw new StoreError(
143: 				`Session "${localId}" not found`,
144: 				StoreErrorCode.NOT_FOUND,
145: 				"update"
146: 			);
147: 		}
148: 		const cleaned = stripUndefined(updates);
149: 		sessions[index] = { ...sessions[index], ...cleaned, updatedAt: Date.now() };
150: 		await this.persist(sessions);
151: 		logDebug(`Session updated: ${localId}`);
152: 	}
153: 
154: 	/**
155: 	 * Delete a session.
156: 	 */
157: 	async delete(localId: string): Promise<void> {
158: 		const sessions = await this.getAll();
159: 		const filtered = sessions.filter((s) => s.localId !== localId);
160: 		await this.persist(filtered);
161: 		logInfo(`Session deleted: ${localId}`);
162: 	}
163: 
164: 	/**
165: 	 * Mark all sessions from a provider as read-only.
166: 	 */
167: 	async markProviderReadOnly(providerId: string): Promise<void> {
168: 		const sessions = await this.getAll();
169: 		for (const session of sessions) {
170: 			if (session.providerId === providerId) {
171: 				session.isReadOnly = true;
172: 			}
173: 		}
174: 		await this.persist(sessions);
175: 		logInfo(`All sessions for provider "${providerId}" marked read-only`);
176: 	}
177: 
178: 	/**
179: 	 * Get terminal sessions that need cleanup (updated before cutoff time).
180: 	 * Only returns sessions in completed/failed/cancelled state.
181: 	 */
182: 	async getForCleanup(cutoffTime: number): Promise<AgentSession[]> {
183: 		const sessions = await this.getAll();
184: 		return sessions.filter((s) => {
185: 			const isTerminal =
186: 				s.status === SessionStatus.COMPLETED ||
187: 				s.status === SessionStatus.FAILED ||
188: 				s.status === SessionStatus.CANCELLED;
189: 			if (!isTerminal) {
190: 				return false;
191: 			}
192: 			const completionTime = s.completedAt ?? s.updatedAt;
193: 			return completionTime < cutoffTime;
194: 		});
195: 	}
196: 
197: 	private async persist(sessions: AgentSession[]): Promise<void> {
198: 		await this.workspaceState.update(SESSIONS_KEY, sessions);
199: 		this._onDidChange.fire();
200: 	}
201: 
202: 	dispose(): void {
203: 		this._onDidChange.dispose();
204: 	}
205: }
206: 
207: // ============================================================================
208: // Validation
209: // ============================================================================
210: 
211: /**
212:  * Runtime check that a deserialized value has the minimum required shape of an AgentSession.
213:  * Filters out corrupted or schema-incompatible entries after deserialization.
214:  */
215: /**
216:  * Remove undefined values from an object to prevent overwriting
217:  * existing fields (especially arrays like tasks/pullRequests) with undefined
218:  * during a partial update spread.
219:  */
220: function stripUndefined<T extends Record<string, unknown>>(obj: T): Partial<T> {
221: 	const result: Record<string, unknown> = {};
222: 	for (const key of Object.keys(obj)) {
223: 		if (obj[key] !== undefined) {
224: 			result[key] = obj[key];
225: 		}
226: 	}
227: 	return result as Partial<T>;
228: }
229: 
230: const TERMINAL_SESSION_STATUSES: ReadonlySet<string> = new Set([
231: 	SessionStatus.COMPLETED,
232: 	SessionStatus.FAILED,
233: 	SessionStatus.CANCELLED,
234: ]);
235: 
236: const TERMINAL_TASK_STATUSES: ReadonlySet<string> = new Set([
237: 	TaskStatus.COMPLETED,
238: 	TaskStatus.FAILED,
239: 	TaskStatus.SKIPPED,
240: ]);
241: 
242: const SESSION_TO_TASK_STATUS: Record<string, TaskStatus> = {
243: 	[SessionStatus.COMPLETED]: TaskStatus.COMPLETED,
244: 	[SessionStatus.FAILED]: TaskStatus.FAILED,
245: 	[SessionStatus.CANCELLED]: TaskStatus.SKIPPED,
246: };
247: 
248: function normalizeSession(session: AgentSession): AgentSession {
249: 	if (!TERMINAL_SESSION_STATUSES.has(session.status)) {
250: 		return session;
251: 	}
252: 
253: 	let tasks: AgentTask[] | undefined;
254: 	const hasStaleTask = session.tasks.some(
255: 		(t) => !TERMINAL_TASK_STATUSES.has(t.status)
256: 	);
257: 	if (hasStaleTask) {
258: 		const targetStatus =
259: 			SESSION_TO_TASK_STATUS[session.status] ?? TaskStatus.SKIPPED;
260: 		const now = Date.now();
261: 		tasks = session.tasks.map((task) => {
262: 			if (TERMINAL_TASK_STATUSES.has(task.status)) {
263: 				return task;
264: 			}
265: 			return { ...task, status: targetStatus, completedAt: now };
266: 		});
267: 	}
268: 
269: 	let pullRequests: PullRequest[] | undefined;
270: 	const hasUnknownPrState = session.pullRequests.some((pr) => !pr.state);
271: 	if (hasUnknownPrState) {
272: 		const defaultState =
273: 			session.status === SessionStatus.COMPLETED ? "merged" : "open";
274: 		pullRequests = session.pullRequests.map((pr) =>
275: 			pr.state ? pr : { ...pr, state: defaultState }
276: 		);
277: 	}
278: 
279: 	if (tasks || pullRequests) {
280: 		return {
281: 			...session,
282: 			...(tasks ? { tasks } : {}),
283: 			...(pullRequests ? { pullRequests } : {}),
284: 		};
285: 	}
286: 	return session;
287: }
288: 
289: function isValidAgentSession(value: unknown): boolean {
290: 	if (typeof value !== "object" || value === null) {
291: 		return false;
292: 	}
293: 	const obj = value as Record<string, unknown>;
294: 	return (
295: 		typeof obj.localId === "string" &&
296: 		typeof obj.providerId === "string" &&
297: 		typeof obj.status === "string" &&
298: 		typeof obj.branch === "string" &&
299: 		typeof obj.specPath === "string" &&
300: 		typeof obj.createdAt === "number" &&
301: 		typeof obj.updatedAt === "number" &&
302: 		Array.isArray(obj.tasks) &&
303: 		Array.isArray(obj.pullRequests)
304: 	);
305: }

52: 		| {

55: 		  }

59: }
60: 
61: export interface OrchestrationReadModelOptions {
62: 	readonly store: AgentChatSessionStore;
63: 	readonly registry: AgentChatRegistry;
64: 	readonly cloudSessionStorage?: AgentSessionStorage;
65: 	readonly cloudProviderRegistry?: ProviderRegistry;
66: 	readonly agentChatStoreChangeEvent: Event<unknown>;
67: 	readonly onCloudSessionsChanged?: (listener: () => void) => {
68: 		dispose(): void;
69: 	};

71: 		dispose(): void;
72: 	};

75: 
76: export class OrchestrationReadModel {
77: 	private readonly store: AgentChatSessionStore;
78: 	private readonly registry: AgentChatRegistry;
79: 	private readonly cloudSessionStorage?: AgentSessionStorage;
80: 	private readonly cloudProviderRegistry?: ProviderRegistry;
81: 	private readonly now: () => number;
82: 	private readonly subscriptions: Array<{ dispose(): void }> = [];
83: 	private readonly listeners = new Set<() => void>();
84: 
85: 	constructor(options: OrchestrationReadModelOptions) {
86: 		this.store = options.store;
87: 		this.registry = options.registry;
88: 		this.cloudSessionStorage = options.cloudSessionStorage;
89: 		this.cloudProviderRegistry = options.cloudProviderRegistry;
90: 		this.now = options.now ?? Date.now;
91: 
92: 		this.subscriptions.push(
93: 			options.agentChatStoreChangeEvent(() => {
94: 				this.emitChanged();
95: 			})
96: 		);
97: 		this.subscriptions.push(
98: 			this.registry.onDidChange(() => {
99: 				this.emitChanged();
100: 			})
101: 		);
102: 		if (options.onCloudSessionsChanged) {
103: 			this.subscriptions.push(
104: 				options.onCloudSessionsChanged(() => {
105: 					this.emitChanged();
106: 				})
107: 			);
108: 		}
109: 		if (options.onCloudProviderChanged) {
110: 			this.subscriptions.push(
111: 				options.onCloudProviderChanged(() => {
112: 					this.emitChanged();
113: 				})
114: 			);
115: 		}
116: 	}
117: 
118: 	onDidChange(listener: () => void): { dispose(): void } {
119: 		this.listeners.add(listener);
120: 		return {
121: 			dispose: () => {
122: 				this.listeners.delete(listener);
123: 			},
124: 		};
125: 	}

127: 	async snapshot(): Promise<OrchestrationSnapshot> {
128: 		const sessions: OrchestrationSessionProjection[] = [];
129: 		const degradedReasons: string[] = [];
130: 
131: 		const [agentChatSessions, cloudSessions] = await Promise.all([
132: 			this.collectAgentChatSessions(degradedReasons),
133: 			this.collectCloudSessions(degradedReasons),
134: 		]);
135: 
136: 		sessions.push(...agentChatSessions, ...cloudSessions);
137: 		sessions.sort(compareSessions);
138: 
139: 		const activeProvider = this.readActiveProvider(degradedReasons);
140: 
141: 		return {
142: 			sessions,
143: 			activeProvider,
144: 			generatedAt: this.now(),
145: 			degradedReasons,
146: 		};
147: 	}
148: 
149: 	dispose(): void {
150: 		for (const subscription of this.subscriptions) {
151: 			try {
152: 				subscription.dispose();
153: 			} catch {
154: 				// best-effort
155: 			}
156: 		}
157: 		this.subscriptions.length = 0;
158: 		this.listeners.clear();
159: 	}
160: 
161: 	private emitChanged(): void {
162: 		for (const listener of [...this.listeners]) {
163: 			try {
164: 				listener();
165: 			} catch {
166: 				// best-effort
167: 			}
168: 		}
169: 	}
170: 
171: 	private async collectAgentChatSessions(
172: 		degradedReasons: string[]
173: 	): Promise<OrchestrationSessionProjection[]> {
174: 		let active: AgentChatSession[] = [];
175: 		let recent: AgentChatSession[] = [];
176: 		try {
177: 			[active, recent] = await Promise.all([
178: 				this.store.listActive(),
179: 				this.store.listRecent(),
180: 			]);
181: 		} catch {
182: 			degradedReasons.push("Local agent session state could not be read.");
183: 			return [];
184: 		}
185: 		const byId = new Map<string, AgentChatSession>();
186: 		for (const session of [...active, ...recent]) {
187: 			byId.set(session.id, session);
188: 		}
189: 		for (const session of [
190: 			...this.registry.listActive(),
191: 			...this.registry.listRecent(),
192: 		]) {
193: 			byId.set(session.id, session);
194: 		}
195: 		return [...byId.values()].map((session) =>
196: 			toAgentChatProjection(session, this.readTranscript(session.id))
197: 		);
198: 	}
199: 
200: 	private async collectCloudSessions(
201: 		degradedReasons: string[]
202: 	): Promise<OrchestrationSessionProjection[]> {
203: 		if (!this.cloudSessionStorage) {
204: 			degradedReasons.push("Cloud agent session storage is unavailable.");
205: 			return [];
206: 		}
207: 		let sessions: AgentSession[] = [];
208: 		try {
209: 			sessions = await this.cloudSessionStorage.getAll();
210: 		} catch {
211: 			degradedReasons.push("Cloud agent status could not be read.");
212: 			return [];
213: 		}
214: 		return sessions.map((session) =>
215: 			toCloudProjection(session, this.cloudProviderRegistry)
216: 		);
217: 	}
218: 
219: 	private readActiveProvider(degradedReasons: string[]):
220: 		| {
221: 				readonly id: string;
222: 				readonly displayName: string;
223: 		  }
224: 		| undefined {
225: 		if (!this.cloudProviderRegistry) {
226: 			degradedReasons.push("Cloud agent providers are unavailable.");
227: 			return;
228: 		}
229: 
230: 		const providers = this.cloudProviderRegistry.getAll();
231: 		if (providers.length === 0) {
232: 			degradedReasons.push("No cloud agent providers are registered.");
233: 			return;
234: 		}
235: 
236: 		const activeProvider = this.cloudProviderRegistry.getActive();
237: 		if (!activeProvider) {
238: 			degradedReasons.push("No active cloud agent provider is selected.");
239: 			return;
240: 		}
241: 
242: 		return {
243: 			id: activeProvider.metadata.id,
244: 			displayName: activeProvider.metadata.displayName,
245: 		};
246: 	}
247: 
248: 	private readTranscript(sessionId: string): ChatMessage[] {
249: 		const workspaceState = (
250: 			this.store as unknown as {
251: 				workspaceState?: { get<T>(key: string): T | undefined };
252: 			}
253: 		).workspaceState;
254: 		if (!workspaceState) {
255: 			return [];
256: 		}
257: 		const raw = workspaceState.get<{ messages: ChatMessage[] }>(
258: 			transcriptKeyFor(sessionId)
259: 		);
260: 		return raw?.messages ?? [];
261: 	}
262: }
263: 
264: function toAgentChatProjection(
265: 	session: AgentChatSession,
266: 	transcript: readonly ChatMessage[]
267: ): OrchestrationSessionProjection {
268: 	const title = deriveAgentChatTitle(session, transcript);

272: 	);

281: 		createdAt: session.createdAt,

287: 		executionTargetLabel: executionTargetLabel(session.executionTarget.kind),
288: 		externalUrl: session.cloud?.externalUrl,
289: 		cloudProviderId: session.cloud?.providerId,

297: ): OrchestrationSessionProjection {

301: 		: session.specPath;
